taxonomy: Pedilonum seranicum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is native to Southeast Asia, particularly in Indonesia and Malaysia. Within the Rubiaceae family, Pedilonum seranicum is part of the genus Pedilonum. The classification of Pedilonum seranicum is further defined by its kingdom as Plantae.
